name: Vegetable Pasta for Crock-Pot
recipeIngredient: 1 Yellow Squash, sliced into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the inside of the crock pot with butter.
2. Add zucchini, yellow squash, carrots, mushrooms, broccoli, onions, garlic, basil, salt, pepper, and Parmesan to the crock pot.
3. Cover; cook on High for 2 hours.
4. Cook fettuccine according to package directions; drain.
5. Add cooked fettuccine, mozzarella, cream, and egg yolks to the crock pot.
6. Stir to blend well. Allow to heat for 15 to 30 minutes.
7. Turn down to Low for up to 30 minutes before serving.
8. Serves 6.
